title: Canadian housing costs relative to disposable income
description: Purchase prices, rent, shelter services, mortgage interest, and income are separate quarterly-aligned series normalized to 100 in 2017 Q1.
plainLanguageSummary: Purchase prices, rent, shelter services, mortgage interest, and income are separate quarterly-aligned series normalized to 100 in 2017 Q1.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: Purchase prices, rent, shelter services, mortgage interest, and income are separate quarterly-aligned series normalized to 100 in 2017 Q1.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
